rationale: A reusable starter enforcing Phenotype Org + AgilePlus compliance for new KooshaPari repos. Reference pattern distilled from focalpoint, phenotype-infra, phenotype-registry, phenotype-tooling, phenotype-hub. Provides community health files (LICENSE/README/CONTRIBUTING/SECURITY/CoC/FUNDING), governance (CODEOWNERS, CHANGELOG, SPEC), GitHub community (PR template, bug+feature issue forms), supply-chain automation (Dependabot, Renovate, Release Drafter), and the Phenotype-mandated health surfaces (CI, OpenSSF Scorecard, repo health). All five reference repos converge on this exact file set; adopting it removes drift before the first commit.

recommended_files.content_excerpt: MIT License — Copyright (c) 2026 KooshaPari. Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy of this software...

# <repo-name>

> One-line tagline. Phenotype-org project under [KooshaPari](https://github.com/KooshaPari).

## Status
![CI](https://github.com/KooshaPari/<repo>/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg) ![Scorecard](https://img.shields.io/ossf-scorecard?...)

## Quick start
## Governance — see AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, SPEC.md, CHANGELOG.md
## License — MIT

Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`). ADR before implementation; SPEC before code. Run `vale .` and `actionlint .github/workflows/` locally. See AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, SETUP_STEPS.md.

Report vulnerabilities privately to kooshapari@gmail.com. Acknowledge within 48h. Scope: <repo> does NOT hold application secrets — see Vaultwarden rotation policy in docs/governance/security-policy.md.
Contributor Covenant v2.1. Report concerns privately via SECURITY.md or GitHub Security Advisory.

# Changelog
All notable changes documented here.

## [Unreleased]
## [0.1.0] - <date>
- Initial release
## Summary / ## Type of change (bug/feature/docs/chore/breaking) / ## Test plan (fmt+clippy+test+deny) / ## Related Closes #issue
name: 🐛 Bug report / Describe / To Reproduce / Expected / Environment (OS, Version)
name: 🚀 Feature request / Problem / Solution / Alternatives considered
version: 2 / updates: github-actions, cargo, npm, terraform, docker — weekly schedule, open-pull-requests-limit: 5
{ extends: ['config:recommended'], labels: ['deps'], schedule: 'weekend', packageRules: [{ matchDatasources: ['docker','github-tags'], automerge: false }] }

name-template: 'v$RESOLVED_VERSION' / tag-template: 'v$RESOLVED_VERSION' / categories: [{title: '🚀 Features', labels: ['feature']}, {title: '🐛 Fixes', labels: ['bug','fix']}, {title: '📦 Dependencies', labels: ['deps']}] / change-template: '* $TITLE (#$NUMBER) @$AUTHOR'
name: CI / concurrency cancel-in-progress / push+PR to main / jobs call KooshaPari/phenoShared/.github/workflows/reusable/ci.yml@<sha> (thin caller)
name: OpenSSF Scorecard / weekly cron 17 3 * * 6 + push main / ubuntu-24.04 / permissions: security-events:write, id-token:write / uses ossf/scorecard-action@v2.4.3
name: Repo Health / weekly cron / checks: CODEOWNERS present, no workflows on >7d-stale, Dependabot enabled, branch protection admin-enforced, stale-bot config, SECURITY.md age <180d

# SPEC: <repo-name>
## Meta — ID, Title, State (specified), Version 1.0.0, Language
## Overview — purpose, scope, non-goals
## ASCII architecture diagram
## Phased WBS — Discovery / Design / Build / Test / Deploy

# Worklogs — research, decisions, architecture, completion notes. Categories: ARCHITECTURE, RESEARCH, GOVERNANCE, DUPLICATION, DEPENDENCIES, INTEGRATION, PERFORMANCE. See ../../INDEX.md for cross-repo index.
